name: Sesame Crunch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Chicken, cut into serving pieces (about 3 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the evaporated milk, 2 tablespoons of Worcestershire sauce, salt, garlic salt, and hot sauce. Mix well.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and turn each piece to coat it with the mixture. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 2 hours or longer.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
4. Combine the cornflake crumbs with the sesame seeds in a separate dish.
5. Roll each chicken piece in the crumb mixture until well coated.
6. Place the chicken skin side up in a shallow baking pan.
7. Mix the melted butter or margarine with the remaining 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce.
8. Drizzle this sauce over the chicken.
9. Bake the chicken for 1 hour, or until it is cooked through and the skin is crisp.
